message:
🐛 Fix nil pointer panic in feedback when FEEDBACK_GITHUB_TOKEN is not set (#1198)

When no GitHub token is configured, CreateFeatureRequest panicked at
the notification creation because it dereferenced GitHubIssueNumber
(nil) inside the struct literal before the nil check could run.

Now checks for nil first and uses a safe default title.

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
